tests.name: complete local quality gate
tests.summary: Formatting, module verification, vet, unit, race, reproducible builds, kernel smoke, Python tests, and repository validation passed.

tests.name: PostgreSQL durability and process restart gate
tests.summary: Integration tests ran with backup/restore enabled, then a daemon restart recovered byte-equivalent canonical run state.

tests.name: migration compatibility
coverage: clean database migration and full rollback
upgrade from immutable version 1 with legacy attempt data
canonical schema and behavioral drift rejection

tests.name: durability invariants
coverage: event replay and corrupt stream rejection

tests.name: official PostgreSQL 18.3 CI
tests.summary: The protected main workflow passed against the digest-pinned PostgreSQL 18.3 service and matching PostgreSQL 18 client.

compatibility_note: PostgreSQL 14.19 on macOS passed as an additional local compatibility check; PostgreSQL 18.3 is the official CI and supported target.
